meta.description: Evidence Upgrade Queue — 按优先级排列需要从 Low → High 的骨架 REL
meta.principle: Low 允许用强框架/间接证据；High 必须等直接 SR/Meta/纵向研究

queue.path: Family Quality of Life → Child Participation
queue.why_critical: KD-FAM ↔ KD-PAR 的唯一跨域桥接，升级后整个 Knowledge Network 的核心连接变为强证据
queue.search_query: family quality of life child community participation disability systematic review longitudinal
queue.evidence_type_needed: SR 或纵向研究（直接证明 FQoL → Participation，非反向）

queue.path: Caregiver Burden → Family Quality of Life
queue.why_critical: Family Science 主链下半段的关键节点，升级后 CP-FAM-001 全链 High grade
queue.search_query: caregiver burden family quality of life systematic review meta-analysis disability

queue.why_critical: Family Science 主链中段，Parent Stress 累积为 Caregiver Burden 的机制路径
queue.search_query: parent stress caregiver burden accumulation longitudinal systematic review disability

queue.path: Participation QoL → Family Quality of Life
queue.why_critical: KOS 的反馈环，证明后系统动力学闭环成立，两条主链真正形成 Network
queue.search_query: participation quality of life family wellbeing longitudinal feedback disability
queue.evidence_type_needed: 纵向研究（需要追踪参与 QoL 对 Family QoL 的时滞效应）

queue.path: Family Functioning → Family Quality of Life
queue.why_critical: Family Science 内部核心路径，Family Functioning 作为 FQoL 的直接预测因子
queue.search_query: family functioning family quality of life systematic review meta-analysis disability
